Title: Relates to geothermal renewable energy credits
Summary: Establishes a tradeable geothermal renewable energy credit compliance instrument for load serving entities.
LawCode: Amd §66-p, add Art 12 §§250 - 253, Pub Serv L; add §99-uu, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law and the state finance law, in relation to geothermal renewable energy credits
